creator: ade@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Update your ports tree.  devel/m4 1.4.8_1 handles the texinfo issue 
as follows: 

.if ${OSVERSION} < 600000 
BUILD_DEPENDS+= ${LOCALBASE}/bin/makeinfo:${PORTSDIR}/print/texinfo 
CONFIGURE_ENV+= MAKEINFO=${LOCALBASE}/bin/makeinfo 
.endif
